title: oldenlandia serpyllifolia
intro: Oldenlandia serpyllifolia, also known as 'Thunbergia serpyllifolia', is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia serpyllifolia typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
